name: 06-22-pkcs-m3b-mixed-language-query-planner
title: brainstorm: PKCS M3B mixed-language query planner
description: Plan M3B query planning and multi-pass lexical retrieval for mixed-language queries before implementing retrieval behavior changes.
creator: tantless
notes: M3B planning scope confirmed by user on 2026-06-22. M3A1 baseline shows Chinese natural no-marker queries produce 6/6 empty results against mostly English corpus content, while English title-style smoke queries hit expected sources. M3B MVP implemented deterministic query planning plus multi-pass lexical retrieval/fusion only; semantic/vector search, translation, LLM planning, and reranking remain deferred. PR1 planner contracts and deterministic planning were implemented on 2026-06-22. PR2 planned search/fusion was implemented on 2026-06-22; local M3 planned search reached top_10 hit rate 1.0 and empty_result_count 0/6. PR3 Context Pack integration was implemented on 2026-06-22; local M3B evaluator with planned search + planned Context Pack reached top_10 hit rate 1.0, context_support_rate 1.0, traceability_rate 1.0, and empty_result_count 0/6.
